location: Dropped by the Dancer of Ranah after defeating her in the hidden arena inside the Southern Nameless Mausoleum, on a small island reached via an underground tunnel south of Cerulean Coast West.
tactics: From the Cerulean Coast West grace, head south along the cliffs to a large withered tree guarded by a Cemetery Shade; a narrow ledge below/behind the tree hides a drop into a cave.
Follow the cave west until it opens onto the island holding the Southern Nameless Mausoleum arena.
Dancer of Ranah alternates a double-spinning sword charge (dodge twice, or punish after the second hit) with a wide flame explosion from her Perfumed Oil of Ranah — roll away repeatedly to clear it.
She backs off to self-heal at low HP; close the gap fast to interrupt, and watch for a jumping slash on approach.
lore: A pair of decorative curved swords wreathed in passionate red flame, used by the dancers of Ranah for a long, sustained dance. Legend holds that the most devoted dancers never let their fiery dance end, losing even their own names as they dance on forever.

builds.name: Pure Dexterity curved sword
builds.why: B scaling in Dexterity with only 9 Strength/20 Dexterity required makes it one of the best pure-Dex paired curved swords, especially paired with its fast Unending Dance weapon skill.
